chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No. D- 121 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case. 1. For orders on CMA No.510/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag ‘A’. 3. For orders on CMA 511/2024 (Ex) 4. For orders on CMA 512/2024 (STAY) 5. For hearing of main case. 30.01.2024. Syed Jaffer Ali Shah, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Zeeshan Haider Qureshi, Law Officer, Election Commission of Pakistan. Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant A.G along with Syed Ahmed Fawad Deputy Commissioner/D.R.O Khairpur. -.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Zeeshan Haider Qureshi Law Officer, Election Commission of Pakistan, learned D.A.G and Assistant Advocate General appearing in other election matters, have waived the notice of this petition and with their consent this petition is disposed of whereby District Returning Officer Khairpur will verify whether Polling station was established in SEF School village Muhammad Bux Katpar in the General Election, 2018 or not and othe basis of such determination either he would retain the polling station at GBPS Imam Bux Shar or shift it to SEF School village Muhammad Bux Katphar. The petition is disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Irfan/PA
